posts.author: arild (Arild Bekkelund)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
You changed the app’s timezone settings to the same as the system time zone last year. Most Monday users find this decision to be wrong. Global companies need to have a default time zone to work from. Therefore, please change this back so we can set the timezone in the Monday settings.

Kind regards
Arild Bekkelund
